reasons.FOMO_AFTER_PUMP: Price is up {{change24h}}% in 24h — common FOMO trap.
reasons.WIDE_SPREAD: Spread is wide (~{{spreadBps}} bps) — execution risk.
reasons.OVERTRADING_SIGNAL: Many analyses today ({{analyses24h}}) — risk of impulsive actions.
reasons.NARRATIVE_PRESSURE: Your reason is hype/pressure — manipulation risk increases.
reasons.ADD_WHILE_HOT: Adding while already holding on short horizon can amplify mistakes.
reasons.BIG_TICKET: Large ticket size — consider splitting entries.

planCodes.SPLIT_ENTRIES: Split entries (2–3 parts) instead of one full buy.
planCodes.DEFINE_INVALIDATION: Define invalidation before entry (max loss or time-stop).
planCodes.WAIT_CONFIRMATION: Do not enter immediately. Wait for confirmation or a pullback.
planCodes.START_SMALL: If you want exposure: start with a very small starter position.
planCodes.ENTER_IN_PARTS: If you enter: do it in parts and keep risk tight.
planCodes.AFTER_CONSOLIDATION: Prefer entry after consolidation (not during spike).
planCodes.REASONABLE_IF_LIMITS: Plan looks reasonable if you follow your risk limits.
planCodes.AVOID_AFTER_PUMP: Avoid buying right after a strong 24h move — wait for cooling.
planCodes.REDUCE_TARGET_OR_EXTEND: Reduce target or extend horizon — target is aggressive vs volatility.
planCodes.MISMATCH_SIZE_OR_DD: Increase allowed drawdown OR reduce size — mismatch causes panic exits.
planCodes.H1D_TIME_STOP: For 1D: use strict time-stop (exit if no progress within hours).
planCodes.H1W_TP_ZONES: For 1W: define 2 take-profit zones and take partials.
planCodes.H1M_IGNORE_NOISE: For 1M: don’t overreact to daily noise; keep invalidation clear.
planCodes.H6M_FUNDAMENTALS: For 6M: focus on fundamentals; avoid frequent re-entries.

pro.title: ScamShield PRO
pro.desc: Deep analysis, AI verdict, advanced sources, and your personal scam history — all in one place.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.text:
1) Paste URL / domain / address / contract / ticker / text and tap “Check”.
2) The frontend sends it to the backend.
3) The backend returns real source statuses, evidence, scoring, AI verdict and community verdict.
4) The final verdict is based on multi-API signals, heuristics, content analysis and community votes.

explain.title: Explain
explain.subtitle2: Enter a ticker — get trend, risk, momentum and key levels.
explain.inputTextPairsOnly: Enter a ticker (e.g., BTC, ETH, SOL). We analyze USDT pairs.
explain.howBody: Enter a ticker (BTC/ETH/SOL) — we fetch data from Binance, calculate indicators and show a market snapshot: trend, risk, momentum and key levels.
explain.alertBadTickerText: Enter a ticker like BTC or ETH.
explain.error: Failed to load data. Check your internet or try another ticker.
explain.atrHint: ATR shows volatility. Higher % means higher movement risk.
explain.levelsHint: These are reference zones, not entry signals.
explain.gEma: EMA is an exponential moving average. EMA20 reacts faster than EMA50. EMA20 above EMA50 = bullish bias.
explain.gRsi: RSI measures strength (0–100). Above 70 overbought, below 30 oversold.
explain.gAtr: ATR shows average volatility range. Higher ATR% = higher risk.
explain.gLevels: Support and resistance are zones where price often reacts.
explain.sparkHint: Mini chart for the selected timeframe.
explain.proBody: Entry zone, stop-loss, targets and checklist in one structured screen.
explain.compareHint: PRO adds scenarios, discipline and advanced tools.
explain.disclaimer: Important: this is analytics, not financial advice.
